questions: mining engineering porar ki ki benefit?
answers: Mining engineering involves the extraction of minerals and resources from the earth safely and efficiently. It covers exploration, mine design, and mineral processing.
Mining engineering holo mati ar pahar theke mineral, coal, metal ber korar engineering. Era mine design kore ar safety ensure kore.
Mining engineers plan and manage mining operations, design mine layouts, ensure worker safety, and develop methods to extract valuable resources with minimal environmental impact.

Mining engineering is essential for extracting resources like coal, gold, iron, and rare earth minerals. It combines geology, engineering, and environmental science to make extraction safe and efficient.
